title: Enqueue a job with a unique period inside a Multi
prompt: Write `MyApp.Notifications.schedule_welcome/1` that takes a `user_id` integer and inserts `MyApp.Workers.WelcomeNotificationWorker` into Oban with `unique: [period: 3600, keys: [:user_id]]` at enqueue time. Use string-keyed args `%{"user_id" => user_id}` and `Oban.insert/1`. Return the job tuple. Write to `lib/my_app/notifications.ex`.
tier_rationale: Enqueue-time override of the unique config using `new/2`. Common idiom.
